arguments.title: Welcome to the Meridian Capital Partners Digital Workspace
arguments.body:
Your new digital home

We're delighted to launch the Meridian Capital Partners digital workspace — a central hub for everything that matters across our Lisbon, London, and Frankfurt offices.

What you'll find here

  • Newsroom — firm-wide announcements and leadership communications
  • Investment Insights — research, analysis, and portfolio updates
  • Compliance & Risk — policies and mandatory reads
  • People & Culture — HR, benefits, and team news
  • Operations — IT, facilities, and office management
  • Events & Milestones — what's on across the firm

Questions or feedback? Reach your workspace administrator at workspace@meridiancapital.pt.
